# SPRINT-16 Report: Upgrade UX + MCP-Native Source of Truth (slice 1)

**Status:** Shipped
**Window:** 2026-04-30 to 2026-05-01 (compressed; planned 2026-05-13 → 2026-05-26)
**Stories:** 10 planned / 10 shipped / 0 carried over (+ 1 CR + 1 in-sprint Bug)

---

## §1 What Was Delivered

### User-Facing Capabilities
- **Update notifier on session start.** `cleargate doctor --session-start` now prints an "available" hint within 24h of an npm publish (registry-cached, offline-silent, opt-out via `CLEARGATE_NO_UPDATE_CHECK=1`). Closes the EPIC-009 deferral. (commits `c294586`, `bada411`)
- **Release narrative on upgrade.** `cleargate upgrade` prints the CHANGELOG delta for every intermediate version before the merge loop runs — users see what's coming before they accept changes. CHANGELOG ships in the npm tarball (Common-Changelog format, backfilled to 0.1.0). (commits `b9a6b08`, `0e01def`)
- **Dogfood install path.** `cleargate init --from-source <path>` installs scaffold from a local checkout instead of the npm tarball; meta-repo can now exercise the same install/`doctor --check-scaffold` round-trip downstream users hit. (commits `6d3be81`, `d1e52da`)
- **`cleargate sync work-items`.** New status-blind, idempotent CLI command pushes drafts and unapproved items to the MCP server without `PmAdapter` indirection. After a successful run prints `→ View synced items: <admin-url>`. First slice of EPIC-023 PROPOSAL-013 reframe. (commit `36208fc`, mcp `45990b4`, mcp `6f57566`)
- **Admin-URL helper.** New `cleargate-cli/src/lib/admin-url.ts` — single source of truth for the deployed admin UI, env-overridable (`CLEARGATE_ADMIN_URL`), project-scoped via `~/.cleargate/`. Future commands (push, doctor, join) adopt without re-hardcoding. (commit `e81c6b8`)
- **BUG-023 fix (in-sprint fast lane).** Pin-aware hook files no longer report `user-modified` after a fresh install — `reverseSubstitutePinAware()` reverse-substitutes the `pinVersion` back to `__CLEARGATE_VERSION__` before hashing. Surfaced by STORY-016-06's E2E run; user requested in-sprint fix. 92 tests added. (commit `db9eaf4`)
- **0.10.0 release ready.** Version bump + CHANGELOG entry land at sprint close.

### Internal / Framework Improvements
- **CR-019 — Sprint close requires explicit human ack.** Protocol §27 + 1 CLAUDE.md bullet (×2 mirror) + 2-line `close_sprint.mjs` docstring edit codify that conversational orchestrators MUST run `close_sprint.mjs <id>` with no flag, surface the prompt, and halt for human approval. `--assume-ack` is now reserved for automated test environments. First sprint to follow the corrected protocol — confirmed via SPRINT-16's own close (orchestrator ran no-flag, reached "Waiting for Reporter…", awaited ack). (commit `eeb433e`)
- **CR-017 reconciler validated.** First sprint to exercise the full lifecycle reconciler at close in block-mode: `node close_sprint.mjs SPRINT-16` reported `lifecycle: clean (0 artifacts reconciled)`. **No `--allow-drift` was used.** Gate proven non-trivial: it had real artifacts to consider (10 Done stories + 1 in-sprint Bug + 1 CR) and converged clean.
- **MCP server-side sync handler.** New `cleargate_sync_work_items` MCP tool with byte-identical SHA computation and per-item transactions (mcp `45990b4`); conflict-detector wired into the response so server-side diffs surface to the CLI (mcp `6f57566`).

### Carried Over
- None.

## §4 Lessons

### New Flashcards (Sprint Window)

Sixteen flashcards landed during the sprint (all dated `2026-04-30`). Grouped by surface:

| Date | Tags | Lesson |
|---|---|---|
| 2026-04-30 | #cli #vitest #import-meta | `import.meta.url` in vitest source-mode resolves to `src/commands/*.ts` not `dist/`; try `../package.json` AND `../../package.json` candidates for worktree-safe version reads. |
| 2026-04-30 | #cli #registry-check #env | `CLEARGATE_NO_UPDATE_CHECK=1` suppresses all `checkLatestVersion` network + cache paths; hard contract once 016-01 ships. |
| 2026-04-30 | #worktree #npm | Worktrees share no `node_modules` with parent; run `npm ci --workspace <pkg>` before first typecheck/test in a new worktree. |
| 2026-04-30 | #cli #stories #version-drift | Story bodies authored at SPRINT-N draft time freeze the `package.json` version literal (016-* says `cleargate@0.8.2` but live is 0.9.0 by SPRINT-16 activation). Always read live version from `package.json`. |
| 2026-04-30 | #cli #changelog #format | `cleargate-cli/CHANGELOG.md` exists pre-EPIC-016 in non-Common-Changelog form; STORY-016-03 reformats to `## [x.y.z] — date` AND backfills priors; format-test regex fails the existing file as-is. |
| 2026-04-30 | #mcp #cli #wire-format | MCP tool requests must NOT carry `project_id` in the body — JWT claims supply `ctx.project_id` (`transport.ts:48`); spec drift in EPIC-023 §2.3 flagged. Both sides drop the field. |
| 2026-04-30 | #mcp #frontmatter #serialization | CLI sha = `sha256(body + serializeFrontmatter(fm))` where serializer uses `CORE_SCHEMA + lineWidth -1 + ---/---` framing (`frontmatter-yaml.ts:17`). Server reimplementation MUST be byte-identical. |
| 2026-04-30 | #mcp #deps | `js-yaml` is NOT in `mcp/package.json` — adding it is required for any MCP-side YAML serialization (e.g. sync sha computation). Pin `^4.1.0` to match cleargate-cli. |
| 2026-04-30 | #cli #commander #naming-collision | `cleargate-cli/src/commands/sync.ts` already exists (718 LOC, STORY-010-04 driver) and `cleargate sync` is registered. New work-item sync MUST be a subcommand or scoped flag. Architect must grep `commands/` before approving any story that names a new command file. |
| 2026-04-30 | #wiki #lint #PostToolUse | PostToolUse gate-check hook re-runs on every delivery file edit; setting `cached_gate_result.pass=true` is overwritten immediately — change `ambiguity: null` instead to suppress gate-failure lint for Completed items. |
| 2026-04-30 | #wiki #lint #pagination | `checkPaginationNeeded MAX_BUCKET_ENTRIES=50` is hardcoded; fix via `wiki.bucket_pagination_ceiling` in `config.yml` + pass ceiling param. |
| 2026-04-30 | #wiki #backlink #children | wiki build reads `children:` from raw EPIC/SPRINT files (not inferred from child `parent_epic_ref`) — broken-backlinks require adding `children:` arrays to every raw EPIC file. |
| 2026-04-30 | #init #hooks #exec-bit | BUG-018 missed the no-force-skip branch; every skip branch that may encounter an existing file must also re-assert `chmodSync(0o755)` if `needsExec` — not just the identical-content branch. |
| 2026-04-30 | #frontmatter #hierarchy #backfill | pending-sync corpus uses `parent_epic_ref:` (33 files) NOT `parent_ref:` (4 files); sprint membership is `sprint_id:` (14) NOT `sprint:` (4) — backfill scripts must sniff BOTH variants. |
| 2026-04-30 | #wiki #ledger #role-attribution | `token-ledger.sh` role-grep loop is hard-coded at line 172; new subagent roles must be added there or tokens land as "unknown". |
| 2026-04-30 | #wiki #ingest #phase4-split | Phase 4 split: TS = deterministic prep + commit; agent .md = LLM spawn via Task; no Node-side Task API. |

Themes: **CLI version/changelog handling** (4 cards) and **MCP wire-format & SHA byte-equality** (3 cards) dominate — exactly the surfaces EPIC-016 and EPIC-023 sub-epic 1 touched. **Wiki/lint** (4 cards) accumulated as the Architect prepared the SPRINT-15 → SPRINT-16 transition. **Worktree hygiene** (1 card, but reinforces 2026-04-24 `#worktree #npm`) — supersede candidate flagged below.

### Hotfix Trend

SPRINT-16 closes with **0 hotfixes**. Rolling 4-sprint count (SPRINT-13 → SPRINT-16): 0/0/0/0 — no hotfix-ledger entries recorded for any of the past four sprints. `trend: FLAT`. No retrospective action recommended on hotfix volume.

### Tooling
| Item | Rating | Notes |
|---|---|---|
| run_script.sh diagnostic coverage | Green | `close_sprint.mjs SPRINT-16` ran clean, surfaced the CR-019 ack prompt as protocol §27 prescribes; reconciler reported `lifecycle: clean (0 artifacts reconciled)`. |
| Token ledger completeness | **Red** | All 24 rows attributed to `work_item_id=BUG-004` (a stale value carried from a prior orchestrator session). Six dev fan-out + four QA Tasks did not appear at all in the sprint ledger. |
| Token divergence finding | **Red — attribution-broken** | Dispatch-marker race: orchestrator wrote `.dispatch-<session-id>.json` to a single session-keyed file across 6 parallel `Task()` spawns; only the last write survived, and SubagentStop attributed everything else to whatever the file contained. **Fix path:** make `write_dispatch.sh` write to `.dispatch-<session-id>-<pid>.json` or a UUID-suffixed path the hook can disambiguate. Until fixed, parallel fan-outs >1 will continue to mis-attribute. **No ledger-vs-task-notif delta computable** because the parent didn't capture per-Task notification totals either; treat the ledger numbers as "orchestrator session only". |

### Outstanding test-suite issues (none attributable to SPRINT-16)

Every QA pass noted these pre-existing failures and explicitly stated they did not regress the sprint's stories:

- `hotfix-new.test.ts` Scenario 5 — wiki regression introduced by SPRINT-15 commit `161cc10`.
- `test_version_bump_alignment.test.ts` — `mcp/` submodule absent in CLI worktrees.
- `bootstrap-root.test.ts` — Postgres test-ordering flake.
- `snapshot-drift.test.ts` — vendored Zod schema mismatch.

Recommend filing a SPRINT-17 cleanup item.
